description_long: This is a freestanding, dark wood shelving unit with three open shelves and a solid top and back panel. The sides feature decorative cut-out patterns with geometric motifs, adding an ornamental touch to the otherwise functional design. The shelves are evenly spaced, providing ample storage or display space for books, decor, or other items. The back panel is solid, ensuring stability and preventing items from falling through. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a smooth wood grain finish visible on all surfaces. The open front and sides make the contents easily accessible and visible from multiple angles.
description: A dark wood shelving unit with three open shelves and decorative cut-out side panels, featuring a solid back and top for stability and style.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves, decorative side panels, and a solid back panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the intricate geometric cut-out pattern on the side panel and the depth of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood back panel with no openings or decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the geometric cut-out pattern seen on the other side.
